title: Year 1: Yingluo enters the Forbidden Palace
story: You are escorted through the vermillion gates for the first time. You are younger than most of the other maids — sixteen years old, and already the palace feels like a maze with no exit. Another embroidery maid whispers a warning as you pass: someone here already wants you gone.

choices.label: Thank her and ask her name
choices.result: She smiles cautiously. You may have made your first friend.

choices.label: Stay quiet and keep walking
choices.result: You reveal nothing. A wise first move.

choices.label: Report the whisper to the head maid
choices.result: The head maid rewards you with a small coin, but the other maids notice.

title: The Stolen Embroidery
story: A piece of embroidery you spent weeks on has gone missing from the workshop. The head maid is furious and demands to know who is responsible.

choices.label: Accuse the maid you suspect
choices.result: The accused maid is punished, but you have made an enemy.

choices.label: Take the blame yourself
choices.result: You are fined and made to redo the work. Others are quietly grateful.

choices.label: Investigate quietly before saying anything
choices.result: You find the thief yourself and handle it discreetly. Your reputation grows.

title: Rumours in the Courtyard
story: Whispers circulate that Noble Consort Gao in the eastern wing poisoned a concubine that is pregnant with the Emperor's child. Your manager pulls you aside, warning you that your name has been mentioned. Next thing you know, you are being questioned by the Noble Consort Gao herself.

choices.label: Swear ignorance and that you know nothing about the rumours.
choices.result: Noble Consort Gao does not believe you, nor does she want to take any chances. She had you dealt with quietly and permanently.

choices.label: Pretend to be crazy and start talking nonsense.
choices.result: You somehow got away with it, you ran Noble Consort Gao's patience thin and she thought you were too mentally insane to be deemed as a threat. She force fed you 10 bowls of lotus balls as punishment.

choices.label: Admit that you informed a higher-up about the poisoning, but offer to work and conspire with Noble Consort Gao.
choices.result: She smiles coldly. You have confessed to knowing too much. By nightfall, you are gone.

title: A Noble Lady's Favor
story: A high-ranking noble lady visits the embroidery workshop and takes notice of your work. She invites you to embroider a personal gift for the Emperor.

choices.label: Accept eagerly and work your hardest
choices.result: Your work impresses everyone, but rivals grow jealous.

choices.label: Accept humbly and dedicate it to her household
choices.result: She is touched. You gain a small but genuine ally.

choices.label: Politely decline, citing your low station
choices.result: She respects your modesty. You remain below the radar.

title: The Imperial Banquet
story: You are assigned to serve at a grand imperial banquet. The Emperor himself walks past your station and pauses for a brief moment, glancing at you.

choices.label: Meet his gaze and bow deeply
choices.result: He says nothing, but a senior concubine saw everything.

choices.label: Keep your eyes down as protocol demands
choices.result: You are invisible. Safe, for now.

choices.label: Offer him a small embroidered token you made
choices.result: He accepts it, amused. Every concubine in the hall now knows your face.

title: Winter Illness
story: A bitter cold sweeps the palace. Several servants fall ill. You feel the first signs of fever and must decide how to manage it.

choices.label: Rest and spend coin on medicine
choices.result: You recover fully. Money well spent.

choices.label: Push through and keep working
choices.result: You survive, but the illness takes a visible toll.

choices.label: Ask your alliance partner for herbal remedies
choices.result: They help you quietly. Your bond deepens.

title: A Generous Donation
story: The palace is collecting donations for flood victims in the outer provinces. The amount you give — or don't give — will be noted.

choices.label: Donate generously (30 copper coins)
choices.result: Your name is read aloud at the ceremony. People remember.

choices.label: Donate a modest amount (10 copper coins)
choices.result: You give what you can. Nothing remarkable happens.

choices.label: Donate nothing and keep your savings
choices.result: Others notice your absence from the list.

title: The Forged Letter
story: A letter bearing your seal — one you never wrote — is found in a senior concubine's chamber. She accuses you of plotting against her.

choices.label: Deny everything and demand a formal inquiry
choices.result: The inquiry clears you, but the process is costly and public.

choices.label: Apologise publicly even though you are innocent
choices.result: The tension eases, but your pride pays the price.

choices.label: Use your alliance to find the forger
choices.result: The real culprit is exposed. Your alliance proves its worth.

title: Promotion Consideration
story: The head eunuch announces that one maid from the embroidery workshop will be elevated to a handmaiden position serving a senior concubine. Your name is among those considered.

choices.label: Campaign openly for the position
choices.result: You get the position, but rivals are watching you more closely now.

choices.label: Let your record speak for itself
choices.result: You are passed over this time. There will be other chances.

choices.label: Recommend a colleague instead
choices.result: Your selflessness is quietly noted by those who matter.

title: The Midnight Fire
story: A fire breaks out in the western storage wing. In the chaos, you spot a chance to retrieve something valuable — or help others escape safely.

choices.label: Help evacuate the other servants first
choices.result: Three maids owe you their lives. Word spreads of your bravery.

choices.label: Grab the valuables and slip away
choices.result: You profit in the chaos, but someone saw you.

choices.label: Do your duty — report the fire and wait for orders
choices.result: You follow protocol. Nothing gained, nothing lost.

title: The Emperors's Brother
story: The empress's brother, Fucha Fuheng, visits Changchun Palace, but you are suspicious of him as he has a pendant that your sister once wore. What do you do when he arrives?

choices.label: Add dishwater to his tea to vent off some anger
choices.result: You get caught and are reprimanded for your actions.

choices.label: Ask him if he knows your sister
choices.result: He looks shocked after you mention your sister's name, but he denies not knowing her.

choices.label: Ignore him and focus on your duties
choices.result: You serve him and the empress tea, but then he thinks you look a little familar...

title: The Seduction Attempt
story: As you were out on an errand, a flock of maids surround a very handsome guard. Turns out it is Fucha Fuheng. Your co-worker attempts to seduce him. What do you do?

choices.label: Ignore her
choices.result: She pretends to trip in front of him, but he ignores her and walks away. He later finds you and warns you to stop asking information from people in regards to your sister.

choices.label: Stop her and warn her of the consequences of attempting to date in the palace
choices.result: She scoffs, annoyed and stomps off. Fucha Fuheng notices your intervention and appreciates your interjection, but warns you to stop asking information from people in regards to your sister.

choices.label: Go a step ahead and seduce him first
choices.result: Your co-worker gets angry and storms off, whilst Fucha Fuhence is confused by your actions, but it seems like he knows your true intentions. He warns you to stop asking information from people in regards to your sister.

title: Placeholder Event — Year 13
story: [Placeholder — replace with narrative content for age 28.]

title: Placeholder Event — Year 14
story: [Placeholder — replace with narrative content for age 29.]

title: Milestone — Year 15
story: You were kicked out of Changchun Palace, but you want to take this opportunity to find Prince He's mother, your sister's murderer. In a howling thunderstorm, you arrive at her Palace of Earthly Tranquility, what do you do to avenge your sister?

choices.label: Run into the palace without permission and demand answers as to why Prince He's mother killed your sister
choices.result: She comes out with a scowl, answering your question, claiming that your sister attempted to seduce her son, Prince He and she had to be dealt with. She then waved her hand as you were sent down to the dungeons on the crime of insubordination. You die in the cells.

choices.label: Request an audience and offer her tea that has been spiked with cyanide from rat poison
choices.result: You were immediately caught as her servants detected the poison in the tea. You are executed for attempted assassination.

choices.label: Overcome with grief, you break down in tears in front of her palace gates, screaming to the thunder gods to punish her for her crimes
choices.result: Prince He's mother comes out in a fury, but as the bolt of lighting struck her palace gate canopy, she gets electrocuted and dies. You have avenged your sister.

title: The Final Year
story: You have survived thirty-five years inside these walls, entering as a girl of sixteen and now standing at fifty. One final event will shape how your story ends. The palace has changed. You have changed. Whatever you choose now, it will echo into whatever years remain.

choices.label: Confess all you have witnessed to the Emperor
choices.result: You speak the truth. What happens next depends on what you have built.

choices.label: Retire quietly and ask for nothing
choices.result: You disappear gracefully. The palace barely notices.

choices.label: Use everything you know to protect someone you love
choices.result: You spend yourself completely for another. It is enough.
